name: IIT Gandhinagar – Post Doctoral Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 is now open for Post Doctoral Fellow posts for [Ph.D. in Economics, Agricultural Economics, Environmental Economics, Water Policy, Planning, Public Policy or related discipline with quantitative skills, proficiency, publications, choice experiments & fieldwork experience, with online applications from to 30-05-2026 through the official website IIT Gandhinagar.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
